chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1014 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 4250/23 2.For orders on office objections. 3.For orders on CMA 4251/23 4.For orders on CMA 4252/23 5.For hearing of main case 13-06-2023 Mr. Shahid Ali Phulpoto, Advocate along with both petitioners. ***** 1. Urgency is granted. 2-5. Both petitioners are present. The girl petitioner has shown us her identity card and is an adult, as she is a divorced lady being divorced by her ex-husband, namely Sajjad Shah. She states that after completing Iddat period, she entered into Nikah with the petitioner No.2 with her consent and without any pressure, coercion or compulsion. Although we cannot conduct an extensive enquiry in the writ jurisdiction of this Court, prima facie, it appears that this is not a case of trafficking. FIR No.98 of 2023 of P.S, Kotdiji has been lodged. I.O of the case shall record statement of the girl petitioner and file statement along with supplementary Challan before learned Magistrate who is seized of the matter. Learned Magistrate shall then apply his independent mind and act in accordance with law. No arrest shall take place in Crime No.98 of 2023 until learned Magistrate has taken a decision on the same. It is hoped and expected that learned Magistrate Page 2 of 2 shall do the needful within two weeks. This order restraining the arrest of any nominated accused pursuant to above FIR shall remain in field for a period of two weeks. In the meantime, the police shall render requisite protection to the petitioners. Instant petition along with listed applications stands disposed of accordingly.
In the meantime, the police shall render requisite protection to the petitioners. Instant petition along with listed applications stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
